title: Sparql: xsd:boolean is occasionally returned as xsd:integer
poc:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX mp: <http://localhost/my/prefix#>

SELECT ?id ?mystring ?myboolean WHERE {
    ?id mp:mystring ?mystring .
    ?id mp:myboolean ?myboolean .
    FILTER (?mystring = "stringvalue"^^xsd:string)
}

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX mp: <http://localhost/my/prefix#>

SELECT ?id ?mystring ?myboolean WHERE {
    ?id mp:mystring ?mystring .
    ?id mp:myboolean ?myboolean .
    FILTER (?myboolean = "false"^^xsd:boolean)
}
key_bug_features: Querying xsd:boolean with FILTER returns xsd:integer
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE my_table (id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY, mystring VARCHAR(255), myboolean BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO my_table (id, mystring, myboolean) VALUES ('abb8616d-502d-4f69-9c90-b0c4d0574343', 'stringvalue', FALSE);
SELECT id, mystring, myboolean FROM my_table WHERE mystring = 'stringvalue';
SELECT id, mystring, CASE WHEN myboolean THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS myboolean_int FROM my_table WHERE myboolean IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, mystring, myboolean FROM my_table WHERE myboolean = TRUE;
